headline: U.S. Bank and DAT: Truck freight rates show modest uptick in early 2026
summary: MINNEAPOLIS, April 01, 2026--The latest quarterly U.S. Bank Freight Payment Index – Rates Edition showed truck freight rates moving up modestly to start 2026, while the gap between spot and contract pricing has narrowed.

headline: What to Expect From U.S. Bancorp’s Q1 2026 Earnings Report
summary: Ahead of U.S. Bancorp’s first-quarter earnings release this month, expectations point to a high single-digit year-over-year improvement in its bottom line.
